candidate_llm_application: LLM inference relay cascade: each layer encodes token states via 'arm positions'; relay-cascade propagates message across the model's depth in microseconds.

results.title: Layer-Wise Information Flow / Depth-Routing: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on layer-wise information flow / depth-routing, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (layer-wise information flow / depth-routing); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (semaphore-codes terms vs LLM terms).
